*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]<ref name="Republic affiliation">Nothing explicit is said in ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Anakin's Quest]]'' about this individual's affiliation with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]; however, all [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were Republic officials following the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] of [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], in which the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] was made a branch of the [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] answerable to the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''Jedi''' lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and into the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. A slender, [[Color/Legends|green]]-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] man with blond [[Hair/Legends|hair]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Reproduction/Legends|fathered]] a [[Youngling/Legends|child]] who became [[Parent/Legends|parent]] to the [[New Jedi Order]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] [[Tahiri Veila]]. Veila eventually experienced a [[Force vision/Legends|vision]] of her grandfather which suggested that he [[Death/Legends|fell victim]] to the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] around the [[Time/Legends|time]] the Galactic Empire was [[Declaration of a New Order|formed]].

==Biography==
[[File:TahiriCon.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Tahiri Veila, granddaughter of the Jedi]]
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] lived during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="Anakin's Quest" /> At some point before or after the fall of the Republic in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="19 BBY">The fall of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] is dated by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> he [[Reproduction/Legends|fathered]] a [[Youngling/Legends|child]].<ref name="Anakin's Quest" /> His offspring in turn had a daughter named [[Tahiri Veila]], born on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="Promises">''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Promises]]''</ref> in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].<ref name="13 ABY">[[Tahiri Veila]] is said to be nine [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old in ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Promises]]'', which, according to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' is set in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]; therefore, her birth year can be placed in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].</ref> Both of Veila's [[Parent/Legends|parents]], [[Tryst Veila|Tryst]] and [[Cassa Veila|Cassa]], were [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], and they passed the trait to their daughter.<ref name="Promises" /> If they were aware of their [[Veila family|family's]] connection to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]],<ref name="Anakin's Quest" /> they never had a chance to inform her about it, for both [[Death/Legends|died]] when she was still very young.<ref name="Promises" />

Unknowingly following in her grandfather's footsteps, Veila joined [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[New Jedi Order]] when her suitability for [[Jedi training/Legends|Jedi training]] was detected.<ref name="The Golden Globe">''[[Junior Jedi Knights: The Golden Globe]]''</ref> She learned of her Jedi heritage<ref name="Anakin's Quest" /> in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]<ref name="22 ABY">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Anakin's Quest]]'' in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].</ref> when she had a [[Force vision/Legends|Force vision]] of her grandfather in the [[Cave of Evil/Legends|Dark Side Cave]] on the planet [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. In her vision, he was chased by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] across a landscape of [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Grass/Legends|grass]] and shot at with [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]],<ref name="Anakin's Quest" /> suggesting he was killed in [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] around the time the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was [[Declaration of a New Order|formed]].<ref name="Revenge of the Sith">{{Film|III}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
The Human was a member of the Jedi Order,<ref name="Anakin's Quest" /> a group of individuals who were able to manipulate [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and acted as the guardians of peace and justice in the Republic.<ref name="A New Hope">{{Film|IV}}</ref> He carried a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]],<ref name="Anakin's Quest" /> the traditional Jedi weapon,<ref name="A New Hope" /> clipped to his belt. He was of slender build with shoulder-length blond [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and green [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], which his granddaughter Tahiri Veila perceived as "smiling" in the vision she had about him.<ref name="Anakin's Quest" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Jedi was created by author [[Rebecca Moesta]] for the [[1997]] young reader novel ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Anakin's Quest]]'', in which he made a brief appearance in a vision to Tahiri Veila.

==Appearances==
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Anakin's Quest]]'' {{1st}} {{Vision|[[Tahiri Veila]]}}
